name: Za’atar Roasted Squash with Spiced Yogurt & Pickled Chillies

ingredients.item:
1 large butternut or coquina squash
3 tbsp za’atar
3 tbsp olive oil
sea salt
ingredients.original:
1 large butternut or coquina squash
3 tbsp za’atar
3 tbsp olive oil
sea salt

ingredients.item:
200g (7oz) full-fat Greek yogurt
1 bunch of mint, leaves picked and finely chopped
2 tsp sumac
1 tbsp ground coriander
2 tbsp olive oil
grated rind and juice of 1 lemon
freshly ground black pepper
ingredients.original:
200g (7oz) full-fat Greek yogurt
1 bunch of mint, leaves picked and finely chopped
2 tsp sumac
1 tbsp ground coriander
2 tbsp olive oil
grated rind and juice of 1 lemon
freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.item:
1 small bunch of flat leaf parsley, leaves picked and roughly chopped
2 tsp nigella seeds
8 fat red pickled chillies, thinly sliced
ingredients.original:
1 small bunch of flat leaf parsley, leaves picked and roughly chopped
2 tsp nigella seeds
8 fat red pickled chillies, thinly sliced
